mapper.select: select m.id, m.requester_id, m.acceptor_id, m.title, m.content, m.created_datetime, m.updated_datetime, f.file_path as recodingPath, vr.recoding_time as meetingDurationTime from tbl_meeting m join tbl_video_recoding vr on m.id = vr.meeting_id left join tbl_file f on f.id = vr.id where requester_id = #{requesterId}
mapper.update: update tbl_meeting set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
